task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is open, displaying the 4StoreyBuilding project (visible in the title bar or project tree).

task_completion.description: Set AREA/PERSON to 40 for all ground floor spaces
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Space Properties dialog or spreadsheet view, the 'Area/Person' (or similar occupancy density) field is set to 40 for the ground floor spaces (names starting with 'G.', such as G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15).

task_completion.description: Set MIN-OUTSIDE-AIR to 750 CFM for all ground floor HVAC systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Air-Side HVAC System Parameters dialog or spreadsheet view, the 'Min Outside Air' or 'Min OA' field is set to 750 for the ground floor systems (associated with the 'G.' spaces).

task_completion.description: Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress window ('DOE-2 Simulation') is visible, or a post-simulation results dialog/viewer appears, indicating the simulation was successfully executed.
The 'File' menu is open with 'Save' highlighted, a save confirmation dialog is visible, or the save icon is clicked.

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to make modifications
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications to spaces and systems are made within the eQUEST application windows, dialogs, or spreadsheets.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by editing the .inp file directly in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent opening '4StoreyBuilding.inp' in Notepad, VS Code, or using terminal commands (like sed/awk) to perform the text replacements.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely triggered the simulation within the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation progress bar or eQUEST native simulation dialog must be visible, rather than just skipping to a pre-computed results screen or faking a terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is '4StoreyBuilding.inp'. There are exactly 5 ground floor spaces that must be modified: G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, and G.C15. Their 'Area/Person' value must be set to 40. There are exactly 5 corresponding ground floor HVAC systems (e.g., Sys1 (PSZ) for the G.* spaces). Their 'Min Outside Air' (CFM) must be set to 750. The agent must use the eQUEST GUI to perform these actions, run the DOE-2 simulation, and save.
